note: Two IBIZA articles cross this leaf. First: tail of IBIZA city article (cabotage tables for 1844-1845, population 1233 vec/5031 alm, history mention of bishopric created 1783). Second: beginning of IBIZA partido judicial article, describing the judicial district structure (5 cuartones, now 5 municipal districts plus Formentera). Statistics table continues on next leaf.
